title: Spicy Korean Shrimp Mandu
description: A spicy twist on traditional Korean dumplings filled with succulent shrimp. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: 1. In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium heat.
2. Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. In a large bowl, mix together cooked shrimp, gochujang sauce, sesame oil, Korean chili flakes, and salt.
4. Lay out the mandu wrappers and place 1-2 tablespoons of the shrimp mixture in the center of each wrapper.
5. Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
6. In a large pot or steamer, bring water to a boil and add the mandu. Steam for 5-7 minutes or until cooked through.
7. Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
